title: 这句话描述了一个充满细节的场景，适合用于宣传cosplay活动或相关产品的营销场景，通过生动的视觉描绘吸引目标受众的兴趣。
image_alt: 这句话描述了一个充满细节的场景，适合用于宣传cosplay活动或相关产品的营销场景，通过生动的视觉描绘吸引目标受众的兴趣。
prompt_original: A highly detailed, realistic photograph of a young East Asian woman sitting in a cluttered backstage dressing room, getting ready for a cosplay event. She has {argument name="hair color" default="vibrant short red"} hair styled in a bob with bangs and is wearing an elaborate fantasy warrior costume featuring a {argument name="costume color" default="glossy red"} and gold tiered mini skirt, a white corset top with black lace and red lacing, matching glossy arm guards, and thigh-high boots. She is looking down with a focused expression, using her right hand to adjust the arm guard on her left arm. The vanity counter in front of her is messy, covered with makeup brushes, bottles, a hairbrush, and extra hairpieces. A large, ornate {argument name="prop" default="fantasy sword with a blue blade and gold hilt"} leans against the edge of the counter. The background shows a brightly lit vanity mirror with round bulbs reflecting a clothing rack, capturing a candid, slightly over-sharpened, and highly textured photographic style.
prompt_zh: 一张高度详细的、现实的照片，展示了一位年轻的东亚女性坐在一个杂乱的后台化妆间里，为一场 cosplay 活动做准备。她留着{argument name="hair color" default="鲜艳的短红色"}头发，发型是齐耳短发加刘海。她穿着一件华丽的幻想战士服装，包括一条{argument name="costume color" default="光亮的红色"}和金色的分层迷你裙，一件带有黑色蕾丝和红色绑带的白色紧身胸衣，配套的光亮护臂，以及过膝长靴。她低头专注地看着，用右手调整左臂上的护臂。她面前的梳妆台很乱，上面放满了化妆刷、瓶子、发刷和额外的假发片。一把大型装饰性的{argument name="prop" default="蓝色刀刃和金色手柄的幻想剑"}靠在梳妆台的边缘。背景中可以看到一个明亮的圆形灯泡的梳妆镜，镜子反射出一个衣服架子，捕捉到一种自然、略微过度锐化且高度纹理化的摄影风格。
